allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=xxx psql -h localhost -U postgres -d quickbite_core -c "SELECT id, email, system_role FROM users WHERE email = 'restaurant58@email.com';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=xxx psql -h localhost -U postgres -d quickbite_core -c "SELECT id, owner_id, name FROM restaurants WHERE owner_id = \(SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'restaurant58@email.com'\);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=xxx psql -h localhost -U postgres -d quickbite_core -c "SELECT id, name FROM roles;")
